message:
fix: 5 operator bugs — TopK nulls-last, HashJoin NULL!=NULL, window sort, sentinel

- TopK null sort was nulls-first, inconsistent with rowComparator nulls-last
- HashJoinOperator joined null keys (NULL=NULL) — now skips nulls in build/probe
- WindowOperator partition sort put nulls first for DESC — now nulls-last always
- SubqueryInOperator used "__null__" instead of NULL_SENTINEL
- HashJoinOperator.toJoinKey used "__null__" instead of NULL_SENTINEL
